_about: Hand-curated AceZone gold-eval seed. 33 cases selected from golden-set.acezone.json. customer_message / ideal_reply are anonymized actuals copied from the source set (body / human_reply). order_context_json is intentionally null everywhere: we have no real, anonymized Shopify order data for these tickets and do not invent any. Cases whose facts/action cannot be graded without that order context carry grading_mode=order_context_required and are still useful for intent + retrieval grading until enrichment lands. Cases without a reliable facit are is_active=false. gold_knowledge_chunk_ids are agent_knowledge.id BIGINT values stored as JSON numbers (not uuids). See docs/gold-eval-foundation.md.
_benchmark_status_legend: Manual quality-gate verdict per case. READY_FULL = intent + resolution + retrieval all gradable, no missing Shopify data. READY_PARTIAL = intent + retrieval gradable now, facts/action need order_context_json enrichment. NEEDS_REVIEW = blocked on missing thread history, unclear policy, knowledge gap, or uncertain expected resolution. EXCLUDE = duplicate / too little context / inconsistent or unusable facit / unrepresentative.

cases.title: A-Spire Wireless: error 8 on dongle, won't power on after draining
cases.customer_message:
acezone headset
Hejsa jeg har et headset jeg lige har købt som gik ud mens jeg spillede og det ville ikke tænde nu efter det løb tør det lyser bare rød og men tænder ikke jeg kan få den til og sige paringlist clear og factory reset men det ville stadig ikke tænde går jeg så ind på appen på pcen med kablet i kan jeg få den til og connect og har updateret den men når jeg prøver på dongle siger den erro 8 hvad skyldes dette
cases.expected_resolution: Guide the customer through the Bluetooth hang-up recovery / re-pairing procedure for a dongle that reports an error and a headset that won't power on. Resolvable on message content alone.
cases.ideal_reply: Hej, Tak for at du rækker ud til os. Jeg er ked af at høre at du er løbet ind i problemer med dit A-Spire Wireless headset. Vi finder helt sikkert en løsning. Jeg tror at problemet ligger i at der nogen gange opstår et hang-up problem med Bluetooth. Der er to måder du kan genetablere forbindelsen på: Den ene er at slukke for dit headset og tage dit headset helt væk, mere end 30 meter, fra din telefon (og PC), som har bluetooth forbindelse til dit headset. Herfra kan du prøve at tænde for A-Spire Wireless og se om den ikke tænder på normal vis. Så sluk for headset'et igen, før du nærmer dig din telefon/PC. Nu kan du, på din mobil, slette A-Spire Wireless fra Bluetooth device listen og herefter slukke for Bluetooth. Tænd for Bluetooth igen og følg den normale process for at connect'e til A-Spire Wireless.
cases.notes: Raw intent in source = complaint; remapped to technical_support (concrete hardware fault, no complaint workflow). content_only: troubleshooting needs no order context.
cases.review_notes: Clean hardware-fault troubleshooting; pairing/firmware/hang-up guides are retrievable. Intent, resolution and retrieval all gradable on content. No missing data.

cases.title: A-Spire Wireless: app spins forever, won't connect/pair
cases.customer_message:
New customer message on 17 April 2026 at 16.43
You received a new message from your online store's contact form. Country Code: DK Name: [redacted] Email: [email] Company / Team: [redacted] Country: Danmark If Applicable, Place Of Purchase And Order Number: [order number] What Is Your Request Regarding?: A-Spire Wireless What Do You Need Help With?: Connectivity / Pairing Body: Min app gider ikke virke når jeg prøver at Connect headset med appen, har et billede af den bare snurre og siger den ik kan Connect
cases.expected_resolution: Provide the forget-device + ANC-button pairing procedure for the AceZone app. Resolvable on message content alone.
cases.ideal_reply: Hej, Tak for at du rækker ud, vi er kede af at høre at du oplever problemer med forbindelsen. Det problem du oplever kan i de fleste tilfælde løses ved at slette/glemme headsettet fra dine Bluetooth gemte enheder, og derefter følge disse trin: Make sure your headset is powered on and that no cables are connected. Make sure your phone's Bluetooth is also powered on. Hold down the ANC button (next to the power button) for 4 seconds until you hear the pairing voice prompt. Open the AceZone app on your phone, and tap the "+" button to add a new headset. Tap on "A-Spire Wireless". The app should find the headset and you can tap the "Connect" button.
cases.notes: Raw intent = complaint; remapped to technical_support (pairing fault). content_only.
cases.review_notes: App pairing fault; forget-device + ANC pairing guide retrievable. Fully gradable on content.

cases.title: A-Spire Wireless: dongle drops connection after ~2 minutes (reopened ticket)
cases.customer_message:
New customer message on 15 April 2026 at 14.59
You received a new message from your online store's contact form. Country Code: DK Name: [redacted] Email: [email] Company / Team: [redacted] Country: Denmark If Applicable, Place Of Purchase And Order Number: [redacted] What Is Your Request Regarding?: A-Spire Wireless What Do You Need Help With?: Connectivity / Pairing Body: i had some problems with my email, so my ticket got closed, but my ticket number was [order number] i still have problems with my dongle not connecting to the headset, and if it does. it disconnect maybe 2 minutes after
cases.expected_resolution: Continuation of a prior firmware-update troubleshooting thread; advise USB port placement and interference checks. The correct reply references prior context ("jeg kan se vi allerede prøvede at opdatere firmwaren") that is NOT reconstructable from this single message.
cases.ideal_reply: Hej igen, Jeg kan se, at vi allerede prøvede at opdatere Firmwaren. For at få donglen til at virke optimalt, anbefaler vi, at du sætter den i USB-stikket tættest på headsettet (og ikke bag ved computeren). Hvis der er andre trådløse forbindelser til headsettet, kan det forstyrre denne forbindelse også. Når donglen hopper af, vælger Windows så en anden enhed, eller forsvinder donglen helt? Prøv eventuelt andre USB indgange, både USB-A med adapteren, og USB-C - hvis muligt.
cases.notes: INACTIVE: the gold reply depends on prior-thread context (an earlier firmware-update attempt) that is not present in or reconstructable from this message, so it cannot be graded fairly. order_context_required because the agent inspected the customer's prior ticket/order. Keep for future enrichment with reconstructed history.
cases.review_notes: Reopened ticket: the gold reply explicitly references an earlier firmware-update attempt that is not in this message and not reconstructable. Missing thread history blocks fair resolution grading. Reconstruct prior turns before activating; intent alone (technical_support) is gradable but the case is not benchmark-trustworthy as-is.

cases.title: A-Spire Wireless: powers off mid-game, can't charge while on
cases.customer_message:

You received a new message from your online store's contact form. cases.expected_resolution: Recommend firmware update, disabling Standby Timer, driver reinstall + factory reset + re-pair, and trying a separate cable. Resolvable on message content alone.
cases.ideal_reply: Hej, Tak for din besked. Det lyder underligt... Har du husket at opdatere headsettet og donglens firmware gennem vores AceZone FirmWare Updater software fra MS Store? Dette er vigtigt. Derudover, hvor længe går der før headsettet slukker? Gå eventuelt ind på AceZone mobil appen, og slå Standby Timer fra (System). Det lyder underligt, at headsettet ikke kan lade imens det tænder, så prøv eventuelt også et separat kabel, for at udelukke kabel problemer.
cases.notes: Raw intent = complaint; remapped to technical_support. content_only. Near-duplicate of g-046 (excluded) — kept as the representative.
cases.review_notes: Power-off-while-charging fault; standby-timer + driver/reset guides retrievable. Fully gradable on content. Representative of the g-046 cluster.

cases.title: A-Blaze: intermittent audio, customer already tried other PC + cables, asks repair or swap
cases.customer_message:
New customer message on 29 April 2026 at 13.20
You received a new message from your online store's contact form. Country Code: DK Name: [redacted] Email: [email] Company / Team: Your Country: Denmark If Applicable, Place Of Purchase And Order Number: Place of purchase: AceZone (official website) Order number: [order number] What Is Your Request Regarding?: A-Blaze What Do You Need Help With?: Other Body: Hej AceZone Support, Jeg skriver angående mit AceZone A-Blaze headset, som ser ud til at være defekt. Headsettet kan godt oprette forbindelse, men der kommer ikke lyd ud det meste af tiden. Jeg kan dog høre lyd, når jeg slår mikrofonen fra og til. Hvis jeg slukker og tænder headsettet, kommer lyden tilbage kortvarigt, men forsvinder derefter igen. Jeg har allerede prøvet følgende: Brug af en anden computer Udskiftning af forskellige kabler Problemet fortsætter stadig på trods af dette. Jeg vil derfor høre, hvad næste skridt er, og om det er muligt at få det repareret eller ombyttet. På forhånd tak for hjælpen. Venlig hilsen [redacted]
cases.expected_resolution: Primary need is troubleshooting (firmware update, driver reinstall, factory reset, re-pair); exchange is the fallback the customer raised. Gold reply continues troubleshooting before any swap. Resolvable on message content alone.
cases.ideal_reply: Hej [redacted], Tak fordi du kontakter os. Det er ærgerligt at høre, at du oplever problemer med dit A-Blaze headset. Lad os prøve et par ting for at løse problemet. Først, sørg for at opdatere headsettets firmware ved at bruge vores AceZone FirmWare Updater, som kan downloades fra Microsoft Store. Dette gælder også for donglen, hvis du bruger trådløs forbindelse. Hvordan har du opsat headsettet? Bruger du kablet eller trådløs forbindelse? Vend endelig tilbage med, om det gjorde en forskel.
cases.notes: Customer-already-tried case (other PC + cables). Primary = technical_support, secondary = exchange_request (raised as fallback). content_only: agent continues troubleshooting without order lookup.
cases.review_notes: Customer-already-tried (other PC + cables); gold reply correctly continues troubleshooting before any swap. Troubleshooting knowledge retrievable. Fully gradable on content; exchange is only a documented secondary intent.

cases.title: A-Spire Wireless: works wired/BT but dongle dead, asks for new dongle
cases.customer_message:
You received a new message from your online store's contact form.

Country Code:
DK

Name:
[Customer] 

Email:
[email]

Company / Team:

Your Country:
Danmark

If Applicable, Place Of Purchase And Order Number:
Acezone.io order number: [order number]

What Is Your Request Regarding?:
A-Spire Wireless

What Do You Need Help With?:
Connectivity / Pairing

Body:
Hej, jeg har lige købt mit aspire wireless, men jeg kan ikke få det til at du' uden ledning. Jeg kan godt connecte med bluetooth, men så er der jo rigtig meget delay på. Når jeg putter ledningen i headsettet så duer headsettet som det skal, men når jeg bruger dongle, så reagerere headsettet overhovedet ikke, hvad skal jeg gøre? Kan i evt. sende en ny dongle? Tak på forhånd. Hilsner fra [Customer]
cases.expected_resolution: Walk through driver reinstall + factory reset + dongle re-pair and firmware update before considering a replacement dongle. Resolvable on message content alone.
cases.ideal_reply: Hej [Customer], Tak for din besked. Prøv gerne denne guide: With the headset powered on and connected to your PC via USB-C cable, open the Device Manager window on your PC. Find the headset under Sound, video and game controllers, then right-click it and uninstall the drivers. After that, try to do a factory reset. We'll need to re-pair the headset and the dongle. Herudover skal du også sørge for, at både dit headset og dongle er opdateret til den nyeste FirmWare opdatering gennem vores AceZone FirmWare Updater software fra MS Store.
cases.notes: Primary = technical_support (re-pair the dongle); customer also asks 'can you send a new dongle' = product_question secondary. content_only.
cases.review_notes: Dongle re-pair / driver-reinstall guide retrievable; gold reply troubleshoots before offering a replacement. Fully gradable on content.

cases.title: A-Spire Wireless follow-up (DE): metallic sidetone despite setting off
cases.customer_message:
Re: [AceZone] Re: New customer message on 13 April 2026 at 19:56
This is a follow-up to your previous request #[order number]. Guten Tag, Gibt es schon Neuigkeiten für mich? Ich habe ein weiteres Problem manchmal wenn ich spreche höre ich mich selber obwohl ich diese Einstellung deaktiviert habe. Jedoch höre ich mich nicht normal sondern metallisch. Liebe Grüße
cases.expected_resolution: Follow-up: confirm firmware status (headset + dongle), check Windows 'Voice Clarity' off, and ask whether the metallic sidetone is constant or occasional. The correct reply references an unresolved prior turn and engineering escalation that are not reconstructable from this message.
cases.ideal_reply: Hi there, Thank you for reaching out again. I apologise for not returning with a response. Did you try the steps I suggested in the previous e-mail? For the metallic sound, could you confirm whether or not your headset is up to date with our latest firmware? This also includes the dongle. You mention that Sidetone is turned off, but you still hear yourself - does this occur every time you speak or only occasionally? Then, make sure that "Voice Clarity" is turned off under Windows Sound Settings.
cases.notes: INACTIVE: genuine multi-turn follow-up whose gold reply depends on prior-turn context (an earlier troubleshooting mail + engineering escalation) that is quoted only partially and not cleanly reconstructable. order_context_required (agent looked up the prior request). Keep for enrichment with proper thread_history.
cases.review_notes: Genuine multi-turn DE follow-up; the gold reply leans on an earlier troubleshooting mail + an engineering escalation that are only partially quoted and not cleanly reconstructable. Missing thread history blocks resolution grading. Reconstruct prior turns into thread_history_json before activating.

If Applicable, Place Of Purchase And Order Number:
6 April order nr [order number]

A-Spire Wireless

What Do You Need Help With?:
Setting up headset

Body:
Hej, håber i forstår hvad jeg skriver, ellers må i lige skrive at jeg skal oversætte. Jeg kan ikke få lov til at få mit headset til at connecte med appen på telefonen, nu har jeg prøvet og lave factory reset, og prøve en anden telefon. Men det fungere stadig ikke. Den siger at connection failed - og ved ikke hvad jeg skal gøre her. Headsettet siger også paring mode men sker ikke noget. [redacted]
cases.expected_resolution: Customer-already-tried (factory reset, other phone). Advise firmware update via Updater first, then ANC-button pairing and forget-on-app. Resolvable on message content alone.
cases.ideal_reply: Hej [Customer], Tak fordi du kontakter os. Vi er kede af at høre, at du oplever problemer med dit A-Spire Wireless headset. Lad os prøve følgende trin for at få det til at fungere: 1. Sørg for, at dit headset er tændt, og at det ikke er forbundet til nogen Bluetooth-enheder. 2. Frakobl din USB-C dongle. 3. Tilslut dit headset til din PC via USB-C kablet. 4. Åbn AceZone Firmware Updater appen. 5. Vælg A-Spire Wireless fra dropdown-menuen og klik på "Update". Efter headsettet er FirmWare opdateret, kan du holde ANC knappen nede i 4 sekunder for at sætte det i Pairing Mode.
cases.notes: Raw intent = unknown; remapped to technical_support. Customer-already-tried case. content_only.
cases.review_notes: Customer-already-tried (factory reset + other phone); firmware-updater + pairing guide retrievable. Fully gradable on content. Raw 'unknown' confidently remapped to technical_support.

cases.title: A-Spire Wireless: USB dongle won't connect to PC (edge)
cases.customer_message: Hi, the USB dongle for my A-Spire Wireless won't connect to my PC anymore. What do I do?
cases.expected_resolution: Re-pair the dongle (hold dongle button until it flashes, reconnect via USB-C); offer replacement only if that fails. Must mention 'dongle'. Resolvable on message content alone.
cases.ideal_reply: Hi there, let's get your dongle reconnected. Re-pair it by holding the dongle button until it flashes, then reconnect via USB-C. If that fails we'll replace it.
cases.notes: Edge case (synthetic short prompt from source set, no order number). content_only.
cases.review_notes: Short synthetic edge prompt with a clean dongle re-pair facit and must_contain('dongle'). Content-only, fully gradable. Kept as a deliberate minimal-context positive control.

cases.title: A-Spire Wireless: left ear holder broke ~1yr, asks warranty help
cases.customer_message:

You received a new message from your online store's contact form. Country Code: PT Name: [redacted] Email: [email] Company / Team: Your Country: Portugal If Applicable, Place Of Purchase And Order Number: Order #[order number] What Is Your Request Regarding?: A-Spire Wireless What Do You Need Help With?: Headset is physically damaged Body: Hello, I buy this headphones 1 year ago and today I found out that the thing that holds the left ear (microphone side) is broken. You can say that this was my fault but its not supposed for a high quality product broke like this, and my headphones are always on the case and they didn't fall. I guess it was by the use and the put and take out of head. In this case I think that you should help because this is normal use.. and it should have warranty. Can you help in this matter?
cases.expected_resolution: Confirm warranty coverage, verify customer shipping/contact details, and initiate a return-for-swap. Whether the unit is in warranty depends on the actual purchase date in the order — cannot be graded on facts/action without order context.
cases.ideal_reply: Hi there, Thank you for reaching out! That doesn't look good... You are still covered by warranty, so could you kindly confirm if these details are still correct? [address details]. I look forward to hearing back from you, so we can initiate a return-for-swap case. Have a lovely day!
cases.notes: INACTIVE: gold reply asserts 'You are still covered by warranty' which depends on the real order/purchase date we don't have. order_context_required. Mark inactive until anonymized order data confirms warranty window, otherwise facts/action grading would be against an unverifiable premise.
cases.review_notes: Intent and retrieval are gradable, but the gold premise (still covered by warranty for a cracked holder after about one year) depends on real purchase date and an AceZone decision on whether normal-use cracking is covered. Keep inactive until both order_context and warranty policy are resolved.

cases.title: A-Spire Wireless: battery only 8h vs 35h spec, wants refund or exchange
cases.customer_message:
Vedrørende ordre; [order number]
Hej AceZone, Jeg skriver til jer, da jeg har modtaget mit nye A-Spire Wireless headset, som desværre har en kritisk batterifejl. I lover en batteritid på op til 35 timer, men mit headset holder maksimalt strøm i 8 timer. Problemet bliver særligt tydeligt, når batteriet når 50 %; herfra drænes det fuldstændigt på blot 30-40 minutter. Jeg har naturligvis sørget for, at firmwaren er fuldt opdateret, men det har desværre ikke ændret på situationen. Da headsettet er defekt fra start, vil jeg helst bede om at få pengene tilbage. Hvis dette ikke er muligt, er jeg dog også åben for en ombytning til et nyt eksemplar. Hvordan får vi løst dette hurtigst muligt? Med venlig hilsen, [Customer]
cases.expected_resolution: State the 30-day return policy (refund within window, otherwise exchange), verify contact details, and offer to create a return label + send a new unit. Refund eligibility depends on order date.
cases.ideal_reply: Hej [Customer], Tusind tak for din besked. Jeg er ked af at høre, at du har modtaget det der ser ud til at være et defekt headset. Ift. returnering af produktet, har vi en 30 dages returret, herefter kan vi tilbyde en ombytning. Er disse informationer korrekte? [address details]. Med disse kan jeg lave et label til dig, så vi kan få det sendt retur, samt sende et nyt headset ud til dig!
cases.notes: Customer states a primary preference for refund, exchange as fallback, with complaint tone. Primary = refund_request; secondary = [exchange_request, complaint]. order_context_required (refund-window decision needs order date). Intent + retrieval gradable now.
cases.review_notes: Customer explicitly prefers refund, exchange as fallback (clean primary/secondary split). 30-day return policy is the retrieval target. Refund-vs-exchange decision needs order date (order_context). Intent + retrieval gradable now; strong partial case.

cases.title: A-Spire Wireless: replacement also has mic fault, requests refund (follow-up recap)
cases.customer_message:
Previous Ticket ID: [order number]

I am reaching out again due to the headset's issue. To recap, the original headset I got, A-Spire Wireless, ended up having a microphone issue. The voice in the headset would say "microphone muted, microphone unmuted" over and over, slight movements of the mic would cause it. I messaged support, showed a video as proof and got a replacement. Well, the replacement ended up having the same issue in much less time than the first. Since this issue has happened with two headsets now, I would like to request a refund as I am not looking to gamble with another one.
cases.expected_resolution: Explain mic-mute switch sensitivity + mic clip, then give the US return address and instruct trackable shipment; refund issued on receipt. Recap is self-contained in the message; the return/refund execution depends on order context.
cases.ideal_reply: Hi there, Thank you for reaching out again. Our mute switch is sensitive in the "standing up" position and we therefore recommend to use the mic clip when muting the microphone. If you wish to initiate a refund, I will need you to send the headset to the following address: AceZone Returns, Prep Partners, [address]. Please mark the package as "AceZone Product Return #[order number]". Kindly select a trackable courier service, and forward it here once you have done so. Once received, I'll initiate the refund.
cases.notes: Follow-up with a self-contained recap (reconstructable context lives inline, so thread_history_json left null). Primary = refund_request; secondary = [return_request, complaint]. order_context_required for refund/return execution.
cases.review_notes: Follow-up whose recap is fully self-contained in the message body (so no external thread history needed). Mic-switch knowledge + return address are the retrieval targets. Refund/return execution needs order_context. Intent + retrieval gradable now; good partial case.

You received a new message from your online store's contact form. Country Code: DK Name: [redacted] Email: [email] Company / Team: Your Country: Denmark If Applicable, Place Of Purchase And Order Number: Here #[order number] What Is Your Request Regarding?: A-Spire Wireless What Do You Need Help With?: Other Body: Returning the headset. I have opened it and tried it, but wasn't able to comfortably use it. I don't have the original shipping box anymore, but everything else is intact. I still have the box with the headset design naturally. How would returning the headset go? Is it possible to drop it off at [address]?
cases._gold_note: AUTHORITATIVE SOURCE = the live Shopify 'Warranty and Returns policy' page, chunked into 3184/3185/3188/3190/3192 (3188 carries the Øster Allé return address; 3192 the diminished-value/warranty text). A correct hit only requires one of these authoritative chunks. The manual_text/saved_reply chunks 3913 + 3651 are SUPPLEMENTARY duplicates of the same policy and are NOT necessary for a correct hit; 3919 is likewise a manual duplicate and intentionally NOT relied upon. Updated 2026-06-07 after read-only audit showed the live pipeline already answers this case send-ready from 3184/3185/3188. See docs/acezone-return-knowledge-review.md.
cases.expected_resolution: Explain the 30-day return policy, possible value deduction for opened/worn units (EU consumer law), the office return address, and the courier/label steps. Largely policy-driven; gradable on content (retrieval of return policy).
cases.ideal_reply: Hi there, Thanks for reaching out. As per our policy, we accept returns within our 30-day return period, even if the product has been opened and briefly tested. Since the headset has been unsealed and worn, it can no longer be sold as new. In accordance with EU consumer protection law, we may deduct an amount from your refund to reflect any diminished value. To proceed with the return: 1. Please ensure all original packaging and components are included. 2. Book and print a return label and send the item to: AceZone International ApS, [address]. 3. Hand in the package for return at your local return access point.
cases.notes: Policy-heavy return question; the canonical answer is the return-policy chunk, so content_only (no order lookup strictly needed to answer the 'how does returning work' question).
cases.review_notes: Policy-driven 'how does a return work' question. Gold remapped 2026-06-07 to the authoritative Shopify 'Warranty and Returns policy' chunks (3184/3185/3188/3190/3192); read-only audit confirmed the live pipeline selects 3184/3185/3188 (matcher rel=1.00) and returns a send-ready answer with the correct Øster Allé address. Manual/saved-reply chunks 3913/3651 kept as supplementary only.

cases.title: A-Spire Wireless: disappointed after 10 min, asks if return is reimbursable
cases.customer_message:
You received a new message from your online store's contact form.

Country Code:
DE

Name:
[redacted]

Email:
[email]

Your Country:
Sweden

If Applicable, Place Of Purchase And Order Number:
Order #[order number]

What Is Your Request Regarding?:
A-Spire Wireless

What Do You Need Help With?:
Other

Body:
Hello. As I've understood, I'm not able to return the headset after use, I've opened the package and the headset is not at all what I expected after just 10 minutes of use. I've gone through multiple EQ's and nothing can make it come close to my old headset. If I return the headset, are you able to reimburse the payment or not?
cases._gold_note: AUTHORITATIVE SOURCE = the live Shopify 'Warranty and Returns policy' page, chunked into 3184/3185/3188/3190/3192. A correct hit only requires one of these authoritative chunks. The manual_text/saved_reply chunks 3919 + 3913 + 3651 are SUPPLEMENTARY duplicates of the same policy and are NOT necessary for a correct hit. Updated 2026-06-07 after read-only audit. See docs/acezone-return-knowledge-review.md.
cases.expected_resolution: Reassure firmware/pairing first, then confirm returns are accepted within 30 days even if opened/tested, with possible deduction, and list the return procedure. Policy-driven; gradable on content.
cases.ideal_reply: Hi there, Thank you for reaching out. It is essential for proper use that your headset and dongle are up to date with our newest FirmWare. For returns and our policies: As per our policy, we accept returns within our 30-day return period, even if the product has been opened and briefly tested. We may deduct an amount from your refund to reflect any diminished value. To proceed with the return: ensure all original packaging is included, book a return label, and send the item to AceZone International ApS, [address].
cases.notes: Raw intent = unknown; remapped to return_request (asks how/if a return is reimbursed). Secondary = refund_request. Policy-driven, content_only.
cases.review_notes: Raw 'unknown' remapped to return_request (the question is whether a used return is reimbursable). Gold remapped 2026-06-07 to the authoritative Shopify 'Warranty and Returns policy' chunks (3184/3185/3188/3190/3192); manual/saved-reply chunks 3919/3913/3651 kept as supplementary only. Refund is a documented secondary intent.

cases.title: Return refund timing: when will money be back on account?
cases.customer_message:
Retur
Hej, ville lige hører hvornår i tror jeg har penge på kontoen igen, fra det headset jeg sendte retur til jer. Mvh. [redacted] Sendt fra Outlook til Android
cases.expected_resolution: Tell the customer the refund is approved, 2-5 business days to arrive, the specific debit date, and the 50 EUR deduction for an opened/tried unit. The reply is entirely order/refund-status specific (approval, dates, deduction amount).
cases.ideal_reply: Hej, Jeg kan se, at refunderingen er godkendt i vores system. Det kan tage 2-5 hverdage før refunderingen kommer ind på din konto. Yderligere skal det også informeres, at vi har trukket 50 EUR fra refunderingsprisen, grundet headsettet har været prøvet på, og er taget ud af indpakningen.
cases.notes: INACTIVE: the entire gold reply is order/refund-status data (approval state, debit date, 50 EUR deduction) we cannot reproduce without real order context — there is no content-gradable facit. order_context_required. Keep for enrichment.
cases.review_notes: Intent (refund_request) is gradable, but the entire expected resolution is order/refund-status data — approval state, debit date, and a 50 EUR diminished-value deduction — none of which exists without order + refund-record enrichment. The deduction amount is also a per-case business decision. No trustworthy content facit; keep inactive until enriched. Borderline EXCLUDE if enrichment never lands.

cases.title: A-Rise: stopped after 5 months, warranty repair/replace (edge)
cases.customer_message: My A-Rise stopped working after 5 months. I bought it directly from your store. Can I get it repaired or replaced under warranty?
cases.expected_resolution: Confirm warranty coverage and ask for a photo + order number to arrange a replacement. Must mention 'warranty' and 'photo'.
cases.ideal_reply: Hi there, your A-Rise is covered by warranty. Please send a photo of the issue and your order number so we can arrange a replacement.
cases.notes: INACTIVE: gold reply asserts warranty coverage which depends on real purchase date; the source facit ('covered by warranty') is an unverifiable premise without order data. Edge case. Keep for enrichment. (Note: A-Rise is normally repair-only per g-028 — this edge facit may itself be inconsistent, another reason to hold inactive.)
cases.review_notes: EXCLUDE: the synthetic edge facit says the A-Rise is 'covered by warranty' and should be replaced, which directly contradicts the real A-Rise repair-only policy seen in g-028 (and warranty coverage would itself depend on the purchase date). Inconsistent, unverifiable facit — not usable for benchmark. Drop rather than enrich; g-028 already covers A-Rise policy correctly.

cases.title: A-Spire: cracked near headband, no order number (edge)
cases.customer_message: Hi, my A-Spire headset cracked near the headband. What can I do?
cases.expected_resolution: Ask for the order number and a photo of the damage so a replacement can be arranged. Must mention 'order'; must not invent a name.
cases.ideal_reply: Hi there, sorry to hear that. So we can help with a replacement, could you share your order number and a photo of the damage?
cases.notes: Edge case: the gold reply only asks for order number + photo (no warranty assertion), so it is content-gradable. content_only.
cases.review_notes: Edge case done right: the gold reply makes no warranty assertion, it only requests order number + photo (must_contain 'order', must_not_contain a name). Fully content-gradable with no order data needed. Good minimal-context positive control for the exchange intake step.

cases.title: A-Spire Wireless: shipping status, app shows no update for 4 days

New customer message on April 14, 2026 at 12:10 pm

Country Code: AD Name: [redacted] Email: [email] Company / Team: Your Country: If Applicable, Place Of Purchase And Order Number: [order number] What Is Your Request Regarding?: A-Spire Wireless What Do You Need Help With?: N/A Body: Hello, could I get an update on the shipping status of this order? I downloaded the app, but there hasn't been any update for the past 4 days. Order number: [order number] Thank you!
cases.expected_resolution: Explain the order is forwarded to the warehouse partner, which is delayed, with an expected ship date. The actual status/dates depend on the real order.

cases.notes: Primary = order_status, secondary = tracking. order_context_required: the substantive answer (where the order is) needs real order/fulfillment data. Intent + retrieval gradable now.
cases.review_notes: Order-status request; the substantive answer (where the order is, expected ship date) needs real fulfillment data. Intent + retrieval gradable now. Note: gold reply's 'warehouse delay' is a point-in-time fact — when enriched, treat resolution as 'report accurate current fulfillment state', not this specific phrasing.

cases.title: Order #4305: only got confirmation, payment not captured — status?

cases.review_notes: Representative of the warehouse-delay order-status cluster (g-038/g-039 excluded as near-duplicates). Substantive answer needs fulfillment data. Intent + retrieval gradable now. The 'payment not captured yet' detail is real order data to enrich, not a content facit.

cases.title: Could not cancel order before shipping, frustrated, has to return
cases.customer_message: I don't want to leave you guys a bad review but my experience with AceZone has been absolutely the worst. I purchased a headset and didn't realize I bought your low end product. Immediately I reached out to cancel the order and there was no way to cancel it myself. I reached out to support and they were not able to cancel the order. Now after a week I just received the device I didn't want. Why wasn't I able to cancel my order? Why wasn't support able to cancel my order? Now I have to pay to send this back just so I can order the headset I wanted.
cases.expected_resolution: Acknowledge the frustration, explain that shipped orders can't be cancelled, and point to the 30-day return window. Answerable on content (policy explanation).
cases.ideal_reply: Hi there, I'm sorry to hear about your experience with the order cancellation process. Unfortunately, once an order is processed and shipped, we are unable to cancel it. This is why support was not able to assist with cancelling your order after it had been processed. You mentioned wanting to return the product. You can do so within our 30-day return window. I understand this has been frustrating, and I appreciate your feedback.
cases.notes: Primary = complaint (no live workflow left — cancellation already failed, customer venting); secondary = cancel_order (the original intent). The answer is a policy explanation, content_only.
cases.review_notes: Tricky intent call resolved well: the cancellation already failed, so there's no live cancel workflow — it's a complaint with cancel_order as secondary. The correct answer is a policy explanation (shipped orders can't cancel + 30-day return), retrievable and content-gradable. Verifies the complaint-vs-workflow rule.

cases.title: A-Spire Wired: is firmware 146 latest? sound feels low
cases.customer_message:
You received a new message from your online store's contact form.

Country Code:
SE

Name:
[redacted]

Email:
[email]

Your Country:
Sweden

What Is Your Request Regarding?:
A-Spire

What Do You Need Help With?:
Other

Body:
Hi there, I bought an A-Spired Cable Version headset a few years ago and I'm unsure if I'm updating it correctly. The headset shows version 146 — is that the latest? The app doesn't show any available updates for this model. Also, the sound feels quite low compared to other headsets — is there a way to improve or increase the audio quality?
cases.expected_resolution: Confirm firmware 146 is the latest for A-Spire, explain it has no EQ management, and suggest checking the connection/interference. Multi-question, answerable on content.
cases.ideal_reply: Hi there, Thank you for reaching out. The firmware version 146 is indeed the latest for the A-Spire headset, so your device is up to date. Regarding the audio quality, the A-Spire does not support EQ management, so there aren't settings to adjust the sound profile. However, ensure that the headset is securely connected and check for any interferences that might affect the sound.
cases.notes: Multi-question case. Primary = product_question (firmware/spec), secondary = technical_support (improve audio). content_only.
cases.review_notes: Good multi-question case (latest firmware + audio quality). Answer rests on product facts: 146 is latest for A-Spire and A-Spire has no EQ management. Content-gradable. Open question for full confidence: verify '146 is latest' and 'no EQ' are current product facts, since firmware versions drift over time.

cases.title: A-Spire Wired: are site earpads compatible? options for replacement
cases.customer_message:
New customer message on April 27, 2026 at 12:44 pm
You received a new message from your online store's contact form. Country Code: US Name: [redacted] Email: [email] Your Country: If Applicable, Place Of Purchase And Order Number: Order #[order number] What Is Your Request Regarding?: A-Spire What Do You Need Help With?: Headset is physically damaged Body: I know I sent a support request a couple months ago about my earpads falling off randomly one day and unable to put them back on. I just realized, are the earpads on the site compatible with my headset (A-Spire Wired)? It doesn't seem so. If they aren't what other options do I have?
cases.expected_resolution: Explain Wired vs Wireless earpad compatibility caveats and offer a discounted A-Spire Wireless upgrade as an alternative. Answerable on content (product knowledge).
cases.ideal_reply: Hi there, Thank you for reaching out! Technically, they are compatible - the only difference is, that the A-Spire Wired has its ear pads attached more firmly than the Wireless model. If you decide to order a spare set of ear pads, we cannot be held accountable for any damages that can occur from the removal and reattachment of the ear pads. With that being said, I can offer you an A-Spire Wireless with a discount of 20% to allow you to have replaceable ear pads in the future.
cases.notes: Primary = product_question (earpad compatibility), secondary = exchange_request (discounted upgrade offer). content_only.
cases.review_notes: Earpad Wired-vs-Wireless compatibility question; product knowledge retrievable. Content-gradable. Open question: the 20% discount upgrade offer is a commercial gesture — confirm whether AceZone wants that as standard guidance or treat it as an agent discretionary action (business decision for the action layer, not for intent/retrieval grading).
